prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel) with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 6266** wastegate actuator, paired with a **BorgWarner EFR 9180** intercooler core (custom bar-and-plate design) to support the **6.0L twin-turbo W12 (CW12)** engine's 750+ HP target. Requires **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (22.5:1 compression)** and **Manley Performance I-beam connecting rods** with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** to handle increased cylinder pressures.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system with **Bosch Motorsport 8-hole high-flow injectors (2,200cc/min)** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to eliminate crankcase pressure under sustained boost (target: 24 PSI on **93 octane + E85 blend**). Includes a **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** with **Akrapovič 409 stainless steel race cat** for optimized spool and flow.

**KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way coilovers** with **Bentley-specific valving** (adjustable compression/rebound damping) and **Eibach ERS race springs (-30mm drop)**. Paired with **AP Racing 4-piston monoblock calipers** (front) and **Brembo GT-R 380mm rotors** (rear), along with **Pagid RSL29 race pads** for track use. Chassis reinforcement via **Bentley Motorsport X-brace** (aluminum 7075-T6) to reduce flex under lateral loads.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm flares) with **custom 3D-printed ABS underbody diffusers** (tested in CFD for 12% downforce increase at 120 mph). Includes **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 forged wheels** (23x11 ET30 front, 23x12 ET35 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (335/25R23 front, 355/20R23 rear).

**LuxuryTec full LED adaptive headlight retrofit** (Osram 8000K laser modules) with **Morimoto D2S HID projectors** and **custom Bentley-embossed carbon fiber headlight housings**. Rear features **Valenti LED taillights (smoked with sequential turn signals)** and a **custom 3D-printed titanium exhaust finisher** (dual 4.5-inch outlets) with **Akrapovič titanium tips**.

**Forge Motorsport carbon fiber engine cover** (clear-coated with Bentley logo inlay) paired with a **custom billet aluminum strut tower brace** (anodized gold, **Bentley Motorsport** engraved). Interior upgrades include **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO carbon fiber steering wheel (flat-bottom)**, and **Alcantara headliner with Bentley embroidery**.
